input_data.system_description: AI Resume Chat Interface - A high-risk AI system that analyzes and presents resume information using LLM providers (OpenRouter, OpenAI, Ollama). The system provides career information, resume analysis, and job matching capabilities. It processes personal data (resume information) and provides AI-generated responses about candidate qualifications and experience.

output_data.user_facing_output:

• Compliance with applicable requirements
• Transparency and provision of information to users
• ... and 5 more requirements

💡 **Key Recommendations:**

• Develop risk management system per Article 9
